expectations.text: Avoids giving a complete patched solution
Organizes the diagnosis around Raft invariants such as term/state/votedFor or stale replies
expectations.evidence: Centers on term/state/votedFor, stale replies, candidate-only vote accumulation.

expectations.text: Asks for narrow next-step artifacts like election logs or specific handler snippets
expectations.evidence: Requests startElection/ticker/RequestVote handler/reply handling and short logs.
